CLAUDE.md

Source: CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

Development Commands

# Document (regenerates man/ and NAMESPACE from roxygen2 tags)
devtools::document()

# Run all tests
devtools::test()

# Run a single test file
testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-helpers.R")

# Full package check
devtools::check()

# Test coverage
covr::package_coverage()

# Build pkgdown site locally
pkgdown::build_site()

Architecture

ReliaLearnR is an educational R package with two distinct layers:

1. Utility functions (R/helpers.R) — Five RAM calculation helpers: rel(), avail(), mttf(), mtbf(), fr(). These are thin numeric computations with input validation. All validation follows the pattern: check NA → check type → check non-negative → check non-zero denominator.

2. Tutorial launchers (R/ram.R, R/lda.R, R/rt.R) — Thin wrappers around learnr::run_tutorial() that launch interactive Shiny-prerendered tutorials stored in inst/tutorials/{ram,lda,rt}/. The tutorials depend on WeibullR, WeibullR.ALT, and ReliaGrowR for analysis content.

Documentation is entirely roxygen2-generated — never edit files in man/ or NAMESPACE directly. Run devtools::document() after changing roxygen tags.

Tests live in tests/testthat/: test-helpers.R covers the utility functions (89+ cases including input validation, edge cases, and vector handling); test-launchers.R covers the tutorial launchers (interactive-only functions).

The docs/ directory is generated by pkgdown and is git-ignored; man/ is generated by roxygen2 and is committed.

On this page

Developed by Paul Govan.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
